name: WW Fruit Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the pastry flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
2. Add the whole wheat flour to the dry ingredients.
3. Gradually add the slightly beaten egg mixed with milk to the dry mixture.
4. Beat vigorously until well combined.
5. Gently fold in the mincemeat.
6. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan(s).
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40 minutes or until done.
8. Makes 2 loaves.
